entities.name: Manifest
entities.context: Document structure defining which blocks to generate from meeting transcripts

entities.name: Transcript
entities.context: Meeting recording content that must be >100 words for meaningful processing

entities.name: Canonical Registry
entities.context: Authoritative source where all valid blocks are registered

entities.name: Block Selection
entities.context: Process of choosing which content blocks to generate based on meeting content

entities.name: Core Blocks
entities.context: Essential blocks that are always generated (minimum 3)

entities.name: Conditional Blocks
entities.context: Optional blocks selected based on meeting content relevance

entities.name: B01
entities.context: Block ID included in minimal manifest generation

entities.name: B02
entities.context: Block ID included in minimal manifest generation

entities.name: B26
entities.context: Block ID included in minimal manifest generation

entities.name: always_generate blocks
entities.context: Blocks that must be included in every manifest regardless of content

relationships.context: Manifest contains justified block selections for generation
All selected blocks must exist in canonical registry
Core blocks correspond to always_generate requirement
Transcript content determines manifest block selections
Conditional blocks supplement core blocks (4 conditional + 3 core in example)
Included in minimal manifest for short transcripts
Included in minimal manifest for short transcripts
Included in minimal manifest for short transcripts
